name: Little Imp daemon API
description: Local-only REST and MCP API exposed by littleimpd.

favicon_url.description: Cached favicon media path or URL

screenshot_url.description: Cached page preview media path or URL

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

alt.description: Image alt text or preview label

BookmarkMediaSet.description: Cached local media available for a bookmark

favicon_url.description: Cached favicon media path or URL

screenshot_url.description: Cached page preview media path or URL

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

url.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL to save

title.description: New title, or null to clear

category_id.description: Category ID, or null to clear

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

read_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time, or null to mark unread

notes.description: Personal notes, or null to clear

stage.description: Pipeline stage that last reported an actionable failure

message.description: Failure message safe to show in the local UI

configuration_related.description: Whether the failure likely requires provider settings

retryable.description: Whether retrying the bookmark pipeline is supported

PipelineFailure.description: Latest actionable pipeline failure for a bookmark

bookmark_id.description: Bookmark ID required when mode is selected

replace_ai_fields.description: When true, allow reprocessing to update AI-derived title, category, and tags; manual notes are never overwritten

skipped.description: Bookmarks skipped because work is already queued or running

status_url.description: Batch status URL when jobs were enqueued

favicon_url.description: Cached favicon media path or URL

screenshot_url.description: Cached page preview media path or URL

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

tags.description: Tag names attached to the bookmark

is_public.description: Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data

CategoryRecord.description: Category row returned by create and update endpoints

is_public.description: Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data

CategoryWithCount.description: Category row with active bookmark count returned by category listings

Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data
Public visibility metadata flag, 0 or 1; local metadata only and does not expose data

TagRecord.description: Tag row returned by create and attach endpoints

TagWithCount.description: Tag row with active bookmark count returned by tag listings

enabled.description: Whether this runtime feature is usable
Whether this runtime feature is usable

retention_count.description: Number of local snapshots to retain

api_key.description: Redacted OpenAI API key. Empty string means unset
Redacted Anthropic API key. Empty string means unset
Redacted OpenRouter API key. Empty string means unset
Redacted custom OpenAI-compatible API key. Empty string means unset
Redacted DeepSeek API key. Empty string means unset
Redacted custom OpenAI-compatible embedding API key. Empty string means unset

pin_hash.description: Redacted PIN hash. Empty string means unset

destination_path.description: Absolute custom backup destination, or empty string for default

endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL, or empty string for AWS

access_key.description: Redacted S3 access key. Empty string means unset

secret_key.description: Redacted S3 secret key. Empty string means unset

api_key.description: OpenAI API key, empty string clears it

endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL, or empty string for AWS

retention_count.description: Number of local snapshots to retain
Number of local snapshots to retain

is_custom.description: Whether a custom destination is active

writable.description: Whether the daemon can write to this directory

path.description: Absolute custom backup path, or empty string to reset

skip_remote.description: When true, create only the local snapshot and skip S3 upload

password.description: Password used to encrypt the package

path.description: Absolute encrypted package file path under the configured backup directory

password.description: Password used to decrypt the package

items.description: Verified backup file path relative to the backup directory

package_encrypted.description: Whether the verified input was encrypted

checksum_verified.description: Whether checksum verification succeeded after decryption

items.description: Verified backup file path relative to the package archive

path.description: Absolute encrypted package file path under the configured backup directory

password.description: Password used to decrypt the encrypted package

allow_unsafe_no_checksum.description: Allow restoring a backup with no checksum file

restart_command.description: Platform-specific command for restarting littleimpd when detectable

health_url.description: Local health endpoint to poll after restarting the daemon

frontend_dist.description: Static frontend directory when served by the daemon

done.description: Completed jobs retained in the queue table

failed.description: Failed jobs retained in the queue table

configured.description: Whether LLM enrichment can run with current settings

base_url.description: Resolved or selected LLM base URL with credentials, query strings, and fragments removed

configured.description: Whether embedding-backed features can run with current settings

base_url.description: Resolved or selected embedding base URL with credentials, query strings, and fragments removed

is_custom.description: Whether a custom backup destination is active

writable.description: Whether the effective local backup directory is writable

configured.description: Whether enough non-secret S3 fields and stored credentials are present

endpoint.description: S3-compatible endpoint URL with credentials, query strings, and fragments removed; empty string for AWS

items.description: Secret class or sensitive URL component intentionally omitted from diagnostics

Diagnostics.description: Redacted local diagnostics payload for user-shared support bundles

tag.description: Release tag from the update source

prerelease.description: Whether the release is marked as a prerelease

update_available.description: Whether a compatible release is newer than the current version

source.description: Release source URL used for the check

is_pinned.description: Pinned flag, 0 or 1; maps Grimoire starred/favorite state

token_prefix.description: Redacted token prefix for display and support

last_used_at.description: Most recent successful token use timestamp

IntegrationTokenRecord.description: Managed local integration token metadata. Full bearer token values are returned only at creation or rotation.

token.description: Full bearer token. Store it now; it is never returned by list endpoints.

IntegrationTokenCreateResult.description: One-time integration token creation or rotation result

routes.summary: Return daemon health, version, uptime, and queue size.
Return a redacted local diagnostics bundle for support.
routes.description: Diagnostics are generated locally and omit API keys, URL credentials, query strings, PIN hashes, S3 credentials, and backup passwords.

routes.summary: Check a GitHub Releases-compatible source for a newer Little Imp release.

channel.description: Update channel to check; defaults from the current package version

source.description: Public GitHub Releases-compatible JSON endpoint; private and loopback hosts are rejected

502.description: Update source could not be read or returned an invalid response

routes.summary: Save a URL and enqueue the ingestion pipeline.

409.description: URL already exists in trash or archive

422.description: Invalid URL or missing url field

examples.title: Save a bookmark
examples.request:
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3210/bookmarks \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"url":"https://example.com/rag-vector-search","title":"RAG Vector Search Notes"}'

body.title: Unprocessable Entity
body.detail: Invalid URL - must be http or https

routes.summary: List active or archived bookmarks with filters and pagination.

category_id.description: Filter by exact category ID; takes precedence over category

date_from.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

date_to.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

read_later.description: Filter by read-later state; accepts boolean strings or numeric flags

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

data.title: RAG Vector Search Notes
data.description: Practical notes about vector search for retrieval augmented generation.
data.notes: Compare chunking guidance with local notes.

routes.summary: Get one bookmark with extracted content.

data.title: RAG Vector Search Notes
data.description: Practical notes about vector search for retrieval augmented generation.
data.notes: Compare chunking guidance with local notes.

content.markdown:
## RAG Vector Search

Use hybrid retrieval when exact terms matter.
content.summary: A practical walkthrough of hybrid retrieval for RAG systems.
content.author: Example Author

routes.summary: Serve one cached local bookmark media file.
routes.description: Media files are served from the local cache only. Missing files, trashed bookmarks, and unknown media IDs return 404.

routes.summary: Patch bookmark fields, tags, archive state, read state, and notes.

examples.title: Update bookmark metadata
examples.request:
curl -X PUT http://127.0.0.1:3210/bookmarks/bm_123 \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"tags":["rag","retrieval"],"read_later":1,"notes":"Compare with local chunking notes."}'

data.title: RAG Vector Search Notes
data.description: Practical notes about vector search for retrieval augmented generation.

routes.summary: Record a user-triggered external open for a bookmark.
Soft-delete a bookmark by moving it to trash.
Restore a trashed bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark not found or not in trash

500.description: Restore succeeded but bookmark could not be fetched

routes.summary: Permanently delete a trashed bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark not found or not in trash

routes.summary: List trashed bookmarks.
List semantically related bookmarks.
Get latest pipeline job and failure status for a bookmark.
Retry pipeline work for one bookmark.
Dismiss the current non-blocking pipeline failure for a bookmark.

409.description: Blocking pipeline failure cannot be dismissed

routes.summary: Enqueue durable reprocess or re-embed jobs for existing bookmarks.
Return progress counts for a durable reprocess batch.
Search bookmarks by keyword, semantic, or hybrid mode.

date_from.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time lower bound

date_to.description: Inclusive ISO date or date-time upper bound

read_later.description: Filter by read-later state; accepts boolean strings or numeric flags

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

422.description: Invalid mode or missing embedding configuration

routes.summary: List categories as a tree with bookmark counts.

data.name: AI Research
data.description: Papers, implementation notes, and reference material for AI work.

routes.summary: Create a category.

examples.title: Create a category with metadata
examples.request:
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3210/categories \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"AI Research","color":"#2563eb","icon":"brain","slug":"ai-research","description":"Papers, implementation notes, and reference material for AI work.","is_public":0}'

data.name: AI Research
data.description: Papers, implementation notes, and reference material for AI work.

routes.summary: Rename or reparent a category.
Delete a category.
List tags with bookmark counts.
Create a tag, idempotently returning an existing tag when present.
Rename a tag without changing bookmark associations.
routes.description: Duplicate target tag names are rejected with 409 rather than merged implicitly.

routes.summary: Delete a tag and detach it from bookmarks.
Attach a tag to a bookmark.
Detach a tag from a bookmark.

404.description: Bookmark, tag, or attachment not found

routes.summary: List domains with active bookmark counts.
Import a Netscape HTML bookmark export.

body.description: Multipart body with a file field containing a .html bookmark export.

422.description: Missing file or invalid bookmark export

routes.summary: Stream import progress over Server-Sent Events.
Read current settings with secrets redacted and runtime capabilities.
Deep-merge a settings patch into persisted settings.
Test connectivity to the configured LLM provider.
Create a local backup snapshot and optionally upload it to S3.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

routes.summary: List local backups and optionally merge remote S3 backups.
Read backup schedule settings and the computed next run time.
Patch backup schedule settings.

500.description: Schedule settings could not be saved

routes.summary: Read the effective backup directory and writability.
Set or clear the custom local backup directory.

500.description: Destination settings could not be saved

routes.summary: Verify a local backup snapshot without restoring it.

400.description: Malformed JSON or non-object request body

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid verify request or backup validation failed

routes.summary: Create an encrypted package file from a local backup snapshot.

400.description: Malformed JSON or non-object request body

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid package request or backup validation failed

examples.title: Create an encrypted package
examples.request:
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3210/backup/package \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"2026-05-13T09-30-00-000Z","password":"correct horse battery staple"}'

routes.summary: Verify an encrypted package file without restoring it.

400.description: Malformed JSON or non-object request body

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid package request, wrong password, or package validation failed

examples.title: Verify an encrypted package
examples.request:
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3210/backup/package/verify \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"path":"/Users/me/Library/Application Support/littleimp/backups/2026-05-13T09-30-00-000Z.littleimp-backup.enc","password":"correct horse battery staple"}'

routes.summary: Restore from a local backup directory, remote S3 snapshot, or encrypted package.

409.description: Backup or restore already in progress

422.description: Invalid restore request or backup validation failed

examples.title: Restore an encrypted package
examples.request:
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3210/restore \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"source":"encrypted_package","path":"/Users/me/Library/Application Support/littleimp/backups/2026-05-13T09-30-00-000Z.littleimp-backup.enc","password":"correct horse battery staple"}'

routes.summary: Test connectivity to the configured S3 backup destination.

422.description: S3 is not configured or connection failed

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

Accept a suggestion and apply its action.

422.description: Suggestion is no longer pending or action is invalid

routes.summary: Reject a pending suggestion.

routes.summary: List managed local integration tokens with secret values redacted.
Create a managed bearer token for an explicit local integration client.
routes.description: The full token is returned only once. Store it in the client and use it as an Authorization bearer token. The JSON body is optional; omit it to create a token named `Local integration`.

routes.summary: Rotate an active integration token and return the new bearer token once.
Revoke an integration token.
Handle MCP Streamable HTTP transport requests.
routes.description: The daemon creates a fresh MCP server and transport for each request. MCP is a local integration surface and requires `Authorization: Bearer <integration-token>`.

401.description: Missing, invalid, rotated, or revoked integration token

examples.title: Call the MCP endpoint
examples.request:
curl -X POST http://127.0.0.1:3210/mcp \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer limp_it_example" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"curl","version":"1.0.0"}}}'

body.title: Unauthorized
body.detail: A managed integration bearer token is required for this route
